emails.subject: Re: EPMI-EES Sale Prices
emails.body: Re: EPMI-EES Sale Prices I can certainly send you this file each day I hope it can be of some help. All the deals it lists are with EPMI Short Term California, which is myself or Jeff Richter; so I'm not sure how helpful it will be in determining which desk or counterparty you have discrepancies with. While we're on the subject of sharing files, though, I had spoken with the confirmation group in Houston about the deal file you send them each day. They suggested I ask to be added to the list so I can better assist their group in finding discrepancies in EPMI-EES deals. If that's okay with you, I would appreciate receiving it. In the meantime, I'll copy you on the EES sale prices starting tomorrow. Thanks, Kate Judy Dyer@EES 01/29/2001 02:40 PM

emails.subject: EPMI-EES Sale Prices
emails.body: EPMI-EES Sale Prices Kate, I am in the confirmation group with EES and try to tie out our confirmtions with the EPMI list I receive from Kim Hundle (EPMI), on a weekly basis. This file would be great help with this process. Is there any way you could send this to me as well? This would help me determine who the problem is with. I would appreciate it. Thanks Judy D
